opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I just woke up covered in intensely itchy hives and terrible stomach cramps after having a steak for dinner.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Woke up with widespread itchy hives and severe stomach cramps a few hours after eating a steak dinner, now also feeling nauseated, exhausted and dizzy when standing up.

symptom_narrative.onset: About 4 hours after eating a steak for dinner, starting with itching all over.
symptom_narrative.duration: Ongoing for roughly the last hour and a half and getting worse.
symptom_narrative.character: Intensely itchy raised welts on the skin plus crampy, gripping tummy pains.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: Really bad - the cramps are severe and the itching is driving me mad.
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: Hives across my chest, tummy and the tops of my arms and legs; cramps all across my belly.
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: Came on hours after dinner and has been steadily building over the last hour or so.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: Standing up makes me feel dizzy and light-headed.
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: Feeling really sick in the stomach, very tired and washed out, and dizzy when I stand.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: Nothing like this before that I can remember.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I cannot really get up - I am stuck on the couch because I feel faint when I stand.

allergies_as_reported.reaction_described: I have never had an allergy before

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: My spouse is here with me and is pretty worried about how quickly this is coming on.
social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: Had steak for dinner tonight; eats meat regularly.

communication_style.typical_message_style: Short, worried messages, with the spouse prompting details in the background.

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home cuff while feeling faint
smartwatch reading, may be affected by movement

objective_data_offered.value: widespread raised itchy welts (hives) across the trunk and upper arms and legs; skin looks flushed
sweaty and flushed, clutching the abdomen, no obvious noisy breathing
